name: Jeff Roe
subject: Fwd: Did you see the polls?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Did you read Governor Walker's email? If you have but you didn't respond -- there's still time to help. |
Friend,

Did you read Governor Walker's email? If you have but you didn't respond -- there's still time to help.

**Voting has already started in Wisconsin -- but Ted needs our help now more than ever to win[tonight.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613525:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r)**

[**Can you make an Election Day Emergency donation of $35 or $50 right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613525:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r)

In case you didn't read it already, I've forwarded my copy of Governor Walker's email below.

He lays out the critical reasons why Ted is the only true conservative and the only candidate that will take on the Washington Cartel.

Please, do what you can -- every second counts.

Thank you,
Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

\--Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Ted Cruz
To: [jeff.r@tedcruz.org](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613525:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r)
Subject: Have you seen the polls?
---|---
| Governor Scott Walker
---
Jeff,

When I ended my presidential bid, I did so hoping it would clear the field so that a positive conservative message could rise to the top...and it has.

**Tomorrow, I will be casting my vote for Ted Cruz.**

_**He is the best-positioned candidate to both win the Republican nomination and defeat Hillary Clinton.**_ He is a proven conservative leader with a bold vision to reignite the promise of America.

After eight years of the failed Obama-Clinton Administration, Americans are looking for real leadership and a new direction. [**Please stand with me in support of Ted Cruz with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more to Cruz for President today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613525:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r)

As a conservative governor, I believe we need a president who understands that our founders intended for the power to be in the states and in the hands of the people -- not concentrated in Washington. Just like we did in Wisconsin, Ted Cruz is not afraid to challenge the status quo and to stand up against the big government special interests.

**That is why I have endorsed Ted Cruz for president.**

[**Your contribution**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613525:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r) can help Ted Cruz win big in Wisconsin tomorrow and continue to rack up the delegates he will need to be our nominee and take on Hillary Clinton in the general election.

Pundits are calling Wisconsin "the new New Hampshire" because of its importance in creating momentum at a crucial point in the primary calendar.

Polls show Ted Cruz will win Wisconsin tomorrow, and I urge you to **[support his conservative campaign right now with a contribution of $10, $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even $2,700](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613525:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r)** so he can capitalize on the momentum tomorrow's big victory will give him.

Let me be very clear: **_I am casting my support for Ted Cruz, not against anyone else._ That is because I truly believe America needs Ted Cruz.**

Senator Cruz believes in the conservative principles upon which America was built, and he will be a tireless fighter for our conservative priorities like repealing Obamacare, ending Common Core, and putting a stop to illegal immigration.

Tomorrow is a big day for Wisconsin...and with your [**immediate support for the Cruz for President campaign,**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613525:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r) it will be the turning point in the race for the Republican nomination.

Thank you,

Scott Walker

[ CONTRIBUTE ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34613526:WXVYn9CgN:m:1:1104269936:4D0C8D160701E5EC04E6186B6C3AA26D:r)

| | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org
---

name: Jordyn Rush
subject: Red numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3974664045406978048/2098981991075545088?refcode=e20160405&refcode2=e20160405nd&amount=25)
---
I had to let you know friend. Our finance team is worried about the red numbers they're seeing ahead of our FEC pre-primary deadline:

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3974664045406978048/2098981991075545088?refcode=e20160405&refcode2=e20160405nd&amount=25)
---

Friend, Katie needs you now to prove that we have what it takes to win on Primary Day this month.

**Help Katie hit her final FEC reporting deadline before our primary. Donate now:**

[**www.katiemcginty.com/pre-primary-deadline**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3974664045406978048/2098981991075545088?refcode=e20160405&refcode2=e20160405nd&amount=25)

Tomorrow is our last FEC reporting deadline before Katie's primary, and all eyes are on us. Katie's the best candidate to defeat Pat Toomey and end his obstructionist and partisan agenda. But to take Toomey on in November, we can't afford to fall short of this final deadline.

Our grassroots campaign hasn't missed a fundraising goal yet. Katie and the whole team are [**counting on you now to pitch in and help us hit our goal before our final FEC filing deadline Wednesday.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3974664045406978048/2098981991075545088?refcode=e20160405&refcode2=e20160405nd&amount=25)

Thanks,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3974664045406978048/2098981991075545088?refcode=e20160405&refcode2=e20160405nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-3974664045406978048/2026924397037617152).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Beth Hansen, Campaign Manager
subject: Read this?
body:
Did you see the latest op-ed in the Wall Street Journal about the
Cruz/Trump attempts to drive Gov. John Kasich from the race?

Peter, did you see the latest
editorial in the Wall Street Journal about the Cruz/Trump
attempts to drive Gov. John Kasich from the race? The Wall Street
Journal sums up what scares Cruz and Trump the most: the
Republican Party will nominate Governor Kasich because he's the
only candidate who can actually defeat Hillary Clinton! Shouldn't
that be our Party's goal?

Please consider chipping in with
a quick $25 or more contribution to show Gov. Kasich that you
have his back and want to defeat Hillary in the fall!
"All of a sudden the two
Republican presidential front-runners seem unnaturally
preoccupied with the guy in third place, and they're teaming up
to demand that John Kasich drop out. Why not let the voters
decide, as Donald Trump and Ted Cruz otherwise like to say?"

"...Mr. Kasich defeats Hillary
Clinton by 6.3 points in current head-to-head polls, according to
the Real Clear Politics average. Mr. Cruz loses by 3.1 and Mr.
Trump by 10.8. Changing these polls would require gut renovations
of the Trump and Cruz public images that will be hard for either
to execute.

Mr. Kasich did the public service
of winning Ohio's delegates - with which Mr. Trump might have
locked up the nomination - and he deserves a chance to see if he
can win Pennsylvania or pick up delegates in the East and
California. He has no hope of reaching 1,237 delegates before the
convention, but what Messrs. Trump and Cruz really fear is that
the convention might want to nominate a potential winner." Read
more (here).

We're just 104 days away from the
convention!

>> CHIP IN $25 <<

>> CHIP IN $50 <<

>> CHIP IN $100 <<

Gov. John Kasich has a proven,
conservative record of results and he has the national security
experience to keep America safe. With your ongoing support, we'll
continue to gain momentum heading into the convention!

Thanks for all that you're doing.

Beth Hansen
Campaign Manager
JohnKasich.com

Paid for by Kasich
for America
www.JohnKasich.com

name: Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: last day to register!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
> Dear Friend,
>
> Today is the last day to register to vote in the April 26th Maryland Democratic Primary. If you are not registered already please do so today. Every vote counts in this important election and Chris needs to know he can count on your support.
>
> **[YES, I'LL REGISTER TO VOTE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c9c/70cdc2ba/47d40096/39682e9/3708500256/VEsH/ "http://www.elections.state.md.us/voter_registration/index.html?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+YES+IrsquoLL+REGISTER+TO+VOTE&utm_campaign=em040516_2&source=em040516_2")**
>
> **[I'M REGISTERED AND WILL VOTE FOR CHRIS](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c9c/70cdc2ba/47d40096/39682e6/3708500256/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/April-volunteers?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+IrsquoM+REGISTERED+AND+WILL+VOTE+FOR+CHR&utm_campaign=em040516_2&source=em040516_2")**
>
> Thanks for being part of this grassroots Maryland movement.
>
> Team Van Hollen | ****[DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c9c/70cdc2ba/47d40096/39682e7/3708500256/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-final-push?refcode=em04516&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em040516_2&source=em040516_2")****
> ---
>

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---

name: Rob Portman
body:
| Peter -- Over the weekend, our incredible volunteers and interns surpassed 1.5 million voter contacts!

We have the hardest working grassroots team in the country -- since last May, we have now contacted over 1.5 million targeted voters through our door-to-door and phone call programs. Our team contacted over 41,000 voters on our first Super Saturday in October and our [Winter Warriors knocked on doors in the snow](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DMoQHeLylCT4&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_5mil_contacts&n=1) and called hundreds of thousands of Ohio voters. In this election, Ohio has a choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland’s failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government. Ohio simply can't afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio when our state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. Jane and I are grateful for your friendship, support, and prayers. It's a great privilege to serve Ohio and an honor to have your help in this crucial election. All best,

Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_5mil_contacts&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_5mil_contacts&n=3)[](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_5mil_contacts&n=4 "Donate Here!")

---
-=-=-
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1_5mil_contacts&n=5). -=-=-

Our team contacted over 41,000 voters on our first Super Saturday in October and our and called hundreds of thousands of Ohio voters. In this election, Ohio has a choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland’s failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government. Ohio simply can't afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio when our state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation. Jane and I are grateful for your friendship, support, and prayers. It's a great privilege to serve Ohio and an honor to have your help in this crucial election. name: Joe Sestak
subject: Ed Rendell is right
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a40/3476a20e/c728dc6/2745c2af/3033602767/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, Throughout this campaign, I have focused on beating Pat Toomey and talking about the issues that matter to working families. Unfortunately, because my Democratic primary opponent is trailing in the polls by double digits, my record is now being falsely attacked. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a40/3476a20e/c728dc6/2745c2ae/3033602767/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0405FBg1&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
Unfortunately for my opponent, even her own campaign chairman, former Governor Ed Rendell, praised my willingness to stake out my position in favor of cutting the debt through $1 of tax revenue for $2 of spending cuts (including the military). He said "our political discourse needs more of these truth-tellers, especially as others are so willing to demagogue the issue."
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a40/3476a20e/c728dc6/2745c2ad/3033602767/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0405FBb1&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
---
Peter, let's end the demagoguery and give the people a Senator who wants to earn the trust of the people by talking about the issues that concern them and the solutions that help them. [Will you contribute today to help me fight back against the baseless attacks by my primary opponent?](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a40/3476a20e/c728dc6/2745c2ac/3033602767/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0405FBp1&amounts=25,50,75,150,500,1000,1500")
Warmly,
Joe

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a40/3476a20e/c728dc6/2745c2ab/3033602767/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a40/3476a20e/c728dc6/2745c2aa/3033602767/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a40/3476a20e/c728dc6/2745c2a9/3033602767/VEsB/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Wisconsin:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors
body:
Since Day One: | Friend --

For weeks, this team has been knocking on doors, calling voters, and making sure that folks in Wisconsin know what Team Hillary is all about -- but the truth is, we were outraised and outspent last month, and we could very well lose the Wisconsin primary tonight.

You've been in Hillary's corner since Day One, and I can't thank you enough for that. If we can stay focused and stick to our plan, the nomination is in our grasp. Coming off a string of losses, our commitment to fighting for every last vote and every last delegate is going to matter more than ever.

**Chip in to help Hillary fight in New York, Pennsylvania, and every other state still to vote in this primary election (when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker!):** [ | | [**Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxNTUxMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzIwOTIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjUxNTUxMDMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NzgwNzIwOTIwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

clean_body: Since Day One: | Friend -- For weeks, this team has been knocking on doors, calling voters, and making sure that folks in Wisconsin know what Team Hillary is all about -- but the truth is, we were outraised and outspent last month, and we could very well lose the Wisconsin primary tonight. You've been in Hillary's corner since Day One, and I can't thank you enough for that. If we can stay focused and stick to our plan, the nomination is in our grasp. Coming off a string of losses, our commitment to fighting for every last vote and every last delegate is going to matter more than ever. Chip in to help Hillary fight in New York, Pennsylvania, and every other state still to vote in this primary election (when you do, we’ll send you a free sticker!): --- ]() Thanks, Robby Robby Mook Campaign Manager Hillary for America Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her: | --- ]() | Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by more than one million grassroots donors. Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Heidi Cruz
subject: quick -- need you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, the polls are about to close in the Badger State, and I have some exciting news! | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34620499:WDNXjtC9N:m:1:1104269936:999A20D1D10C9D515D172AA1F0361DC5:r)
---
Friend,

The polls are about to close in the Badger State, and I have some exciting news!

First: Ted is looking very strong in Wisconsin! And because of that, we are on the road to winning the Republican nomination.

But before Ted goes on stage to give his election night speech, I have something I really need your help with.

You see: _we were worried about our fundraising this month, but Ted's campaign manager just shared some great news, we are about to set a fundraising record TODAY!_

**That's right, we are on the verge of having our single BEST fundraising day of the campaign, and you can help put us over the top.**

[**Will you chip in $5 or $50 to help us get there before midnight tonight?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34620499:WDNXjtC9N:m:1:1104269936:999A20D1D10C9D515D172AA1F0361DC5:r)

Ted's victories from Maine to Iowa to Alaska -- and a solid showing in Wisconsin tonight -- are clear signs that conservatives are uniting.

We have the momentum, but the fight against Donald Trump and his billions is nowhere close to over -- will you push us over the top?!

Setting this fundraising record will be another huge win for the campaign, just when we need it most.

**Thanks for all that you do, and please keep supporting Ted in this grueling campaign!**

Best,
Heidi Cruz

P.S. Did I mention we're about to set a record? We're still short though -- [**chip in even $5 and help us score another victory tonight.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34620499:WDNXjtC9N:m:1:1104269936:999A20D1D10C9D515D172AA1F0361DC5:r)

| PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org
---

subject: SURGING ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6135546342103056384/2315717723142750208?refcode=e20160405.2&refcode2=e20160405.2nd&amount=25)
---
_Harper Polling_ : "With three weeks remaining, **Katie McGinty is closing on Joe Sestak in the race for the Democratic nomination for the Senate "
[Give Katie a grassroots surge: RUSH $5 right now >> ](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6135546342103056384/2315717723142750208?refcode=e20160405.2&refcode2=e20160405.2nd&amount=25)** **BREAKING new polling out this morning, ****friend****:**

We're surging ahead and tightening this race for U.S. Senate! **The latest _Harper Poll_ out today shows that we've jumped 14 points in the past five weeks, and we're closing the gap with three weeks to go until Primary Day.**

Today's poll confirms what we've long known: We can and will win this race and secure Katie as our Democratic nominee to replace Pat Toomey. We're in the final stretch of this primary campaign, and we can't afford to lose our momentum.

[**RIGHT NOW: Rush $5 or whatever you can before tomorrow 's FEC deadline. Katie still needs 205 new donors to chip in before midnight tomorrow.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6135546342103056384/2315717723142750208?refcode=e20160405.2&refcode2=e20160405.2nd&amount=25)

This campaign has never been stronger. President Obama and Vice President Biden endorsed Katie because they know she's the best candidate to defeat Pat Toomey, end the GOP obstruction, and take back the Senate majority for Democrats.

**Katie 's fundraising deadline tomorrow is critical: It's our final FEC filing deadline ahead of this month's primary.** We need the strongest showing possible to prove that the polls are right and we have the grassroots power to win on Primary Day and defeat Toomey next fall.

[**Make an urgent donation to Katie 's grassroots campaign before tomorrow's deadline and help close the gap and win on Primary Day.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6135546342103056384/2315717723142750208?refcode=e20160405.2&refcode2=e20160405.2nd&amount=25)
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6135546342103056384/2315717723142750208?refcode=e20160405.2&refcode2=e20160405.2nd&amount=25)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-6135546342103056384/2243660129104822272).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Joe Sestak
subject: What I'm doing before tonight's debate
body:
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c342/884586314/VEsH/ "http://joesestak.com")
---

Peter, I am typing this email via my car's wireless hotspot in the midst of the 305 mile ride along the PA Turnpike headed toward Pittsburgh for tonight's debate. I left Philadelphia early so before I go into the debate, I would have time to meet with a multicultural group of Pennsylvanians including Chinese, Indian, Muslim, and black Americans, who asked me to speak with them. Of the two discussions this evening, my meeting with the strength of our nation -- our diverse heritage -- is the more important ...except that I cannot best ensure a more perfect Union for our country unless I replace Sen Toomey as PA's Senator, and therefore tonight's debate is equally important. | [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c341/884586314/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0405FB2b1&amounts=5,15,30,50,150,305,500")
---
But Peter, I have been intent this entire campaign to touch people -- and now we are out-funded 2 to 1 by outside interest groups, not even by my opponent.
**A new poll out today has me 10 points ahead, with 3 weeks to go ....[and I am asking you here within the Sestak Grassroots Network to help me, now, with anything you can do, sending $5, $15, $30, or $50 ... or $305 ... to ensure I can serve people, such as those I will meet with, shortly!](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c340/884586314/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0405FB2p1&amounts=5,15,30,50,150,305,500")**
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c34f/884586314/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gotyour6?refcode=16EM0405FB2b2&amounts=5,15,30,50,150,305,500")
---
Thank you and warmly,
Joe Sestak
P.S. The debate is being aired tonight on WTAE in Pittsburgh, WTAJ in Johnstown/Altoona, WJET in Erie, and WGAL in Harrisburg -- tune in at 7!

| [](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c34e/884586314/VEsD/ "https://www.facebook.com/joesestak")[
](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c34d/884586314/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/admiraljoesestak-web?refcode=Footer")
[](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c34c/884586314/VEsB/ "http://joesestak.com/") |
---|---|---
| Friends of Joe Sestak
P.O. Box 1936
Media, PA 19063

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | [Unsubscribe](http://action.joesestak.com/page/m/1719a5a/3476a20e/c732c5d/2745c34b/884586314/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://action.joesestak.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") |

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Brace yourself if we win Wisconsin tonight
body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
Today is a very important day for our campaign. We've won six of the last seven contests and have a chance to do VERY well in Wisconsin tonight.
This isn't something the political establishment ever expected. That's probably why one of the Clinton campaign's largest super PACs, the one run by former Republican hatchet man David Brock, has ratcheted up its attacks dramatically.
**But their attacks over the past week are NOTHING compared to what we can expect if we win Wisconsintonight.** The Clinton campaign and its super PACs are going to throw everything they can at us, and we need to be prepared to **fight, organize,** and **win** in New York. That's why we have to ask:
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign before the polls close in Wisconsin tonight, and we 're going to come out of tonight prepared to respond to anything the Clinton campaign and its super PACs throw our way.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-organize-win?refcode=em160405s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-organize-win?refcode=em160405s1-full")
When we started our campaign, we were down more than 40 points in Wisconsin and no one gave us a chance. Today, we have a chance to do very well. **When we started our campaign, we were down almost 50 points in New York, andtoday there are polls showing us having cut Hillary Clinton's lead down to 10.**
We are a campaign on the move, and if we continue to stand together and fight against the political and financial establishment who are trying to stop us in New York, we are going to win. [**That 's why your $3 contribution to our campaign before the polls close in Wisconsin is so critically important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-organize-win?refcode=em160405s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-organize-win?refcode=em160405s1-full")
Real change comes about when large numbers of ordinary Americans speak, vote and get involved in the democratic process. That is what we are doing on this campaign.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-organize-win?refcode=em160405s1-full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/fight-organize-win?refcode=em160405s1-full")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Ted Cruz
subject: turning point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
body:
Friend, tonight is a turning point. We won Wisconsin, and we're about to set a campaign fundraising record! | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622414:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)
---
Friend,

Tonight is a turning point.

**We won Wisconsin, and we're about to set a campaign fundraising record!**

Without a doubt, tonight is a turning point -- proof that I (but only with your help) can defeat Donald Trump for the GOP nomination and beat Hillary Clinton in November.

More on that in a moment, but first, I need to ask you for something.

Friend, I know Heidi already emailed you about the great news -- we are incredibly close to setting a single-day campaign fundraising record! To help set this record and build on tonight's BIG victory, [**will you stop and make a TURNING POINT contribution of $3 or more?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622414:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)

In doing so, you'll put me over the top -- a sure signal to both Hillary Clinton and the Washington Cartel that their days are numbered.

You see: we know something they don't...after enduring seven long years of a president whose liberal agenda has increased the gap between rich and poor and put the safety and security of our homeland at risk, the American people are rising up to make a change in leadership.

With you on board...come November, we'll put an end to the Washington status quo because we, the American people, are demanding that we return to a Constitutionally limited government.

It's not too late to turn this country around and bring back jobs, freedom, and security. [**I ask you to come join us.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622414:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)

This is our chance to fight once again for the freedom that has made us the greatest beacon of liberty the world has ever known.

Friend, after tonight's HUGE win in Wisconsin, conservatives are uniting to help us set an all-time campaign fundraising record!

I cannot do it without you.

[**So, will you stop what you are doing and make the record setting contribution?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622414:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)

[ Turning Point Contribution: $35 » ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622415:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)

[ Turning Point Contribution: $50 » ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622416:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)

[ Turning Point Contribution: $100 » ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622417:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)

[ Turning Point Contribution: $250 » ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/34622418:WRI0ptCNV:m:1:1104269936:9D99D3F5B713263DBDB8712382974A14:r)
We're so close -- even a gift of $3 can make all the difference tonight.

I need you because this campaign is about you -- the working men and women across this country -- and if you stand with us, we will stand for you from day one in the Oval Office.

Thank you and God bless!

For liberty,

Ted Cruz

| PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT
www.tedcruz.org
---

Without a doubt, tonight is a turning point -- proof that I (but only with your help) can defeat Donald Trump for the GOP nomination and beat Hillary Clinton in November. More on that in a moment, but first, I need to ask you for something. Friend, I know Heidi already emailed you about the great news -- we are incredibly close to setting a single-day campaign fundraising record! To help set this record and build on tonight's BIG victory, In doing so, you'll put me over the top -- a sure signal to both Hillary Clinton and the Washington Cartel that their days are numbered. You see: we know something they don't...after enduring seven long years of a president whose liberal agenda has increased the gap between rich and poor and put the safety and security of our homeland at risk, the American people are rising up to make a change in leadership. With you on board...come November, we'll put an end to the Washington status quo because we, the American people, are demanding that we return to a Constitutionally limited government. It's not too late to turn this country around and bring back jobs, freedom, and security. This is our chance to fight once again for the freedom that has made us the greatest beacon of liberty the world has ever known. Friend, after tonight's HUGE win in Wisconsin, conservatives are uniting to help us set an all-time campaign fundraising record! I cannot do it without you. We're so close -- even a gift of $3 can make all the difference tonight. I need you because this campaign is about you -- the working men and women across this country -- and if you stand with us, we will stand for you from day one in the Oval Office. Thank you and God bless! For liberty, Ted Cruz | PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www.tedcruz.org Copyright (C) 2016 All Rights Reserved | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system October 8, 2015. For more information . | mailto:unsub-33861119229-echo3-77A8D49FC0885A602A7CB36F4212F390@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Rapid Response (via VanHollen.org)
subject: Breaking Update: Maryland Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
>
>
> **BREAKING:** Recent polling claims the race is tightening and our opponent has gone negative. Two attack ads against Chris went on the air this morning. We must fight back. **[Contribute in the next 24 hours to our Rapid Response fund.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d67/70cdc2ba/47d4dfe4/3969d3f/3387205029/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/april-final-push?refcode=em4516&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Contribute+in+the+next+24+hours+to+our+R&utm_campaign=em4516&source=em4516")** Friend,
>
> We will be brief. This is a critical moment.
>
> We are facing the worst kind of electoral politics right now -- use of untruths to try to change minds in the final weeks of the campaign. There are two attack ads on the air right now and we need to make sure we have the urgent resources to set the record straight before this barrage of falsehoods.
>
> [**Please contribute right now at this personalized link so the money can count in time >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91d67/70cdc2ba/47d4dfe4/3969d3c/3387205029/VEsE/
